endpoints.name: Returns detailed information about an ATM location.  This information can be used to display ATMs on a map, provide driving directions, or show special ATM features.
endpoints.description: Returns detailed information about an ATM location.  This information can be used to display ATMs on a map, provide driving directions, or show special ATM features.

endpoints.name: Returns countries with valid ATM locations.
endpoints.description: Returns countries with valid ATM locations.

endpoints.name: Returns country subdivisions that have ATM locations.  A country subdivision is a segment within a country (ex  state or province). Country subdivisions are only available for the US and Canada.
endpoints.description: Returns country subdivisions that have ATM locations.  A country subdivision is a segment within a country (ex  state or province). Country subdivisions are only available for the US and Canada.

endpoints.name: Returns a list of all merchant categories for contactless and cash back merchants (example:  Airline, Retail, etc.).
endpoints.description: Returns a list of all merchant categories for contactless and cash back merchants (example:  Airline, Retail, etc.).

endpoints.name: Returns countries that have Merchants offering the following services: accept contactless-enabled cards and devices, allow customers to add money to an eligible MasterCard or Maestro prepaid card, issue MasterCard Prepaid Travel cards, offer cash at checkout when paying with a Debit MasterCard or Maestro Card.
endpoints.description: Returns countries that have Merchants offering the following services: accept contactless-enabled cards and devices, allow customers to add money to an eligible MasterCard or Maestro prepaid card, issue MasterCard Prepaid Travel cards, offer cash at checkout when paying with a Debit MasterCard or Maestro Card.

endpoints.name: Returns country subdivisions that have Merchants offering the following services: accept contactless-enabled cards and devices, allow customers to add money to an eligible MasterCard or Maestro prepaid card, issue MasterCard Prepaid Travel cards, offer cash at checkout when paying with a Debit MasterCard or Maestro Card. A country subdivision is a segment within a country (ex  state or province).  Please note country subdivisions are only available for the US and Canada.
endpoints.description: Returns country subdivisions that have Merchants offering the following services: accept contactless-enabled cards and devices, allow customers to add money to an eligible MasterCard or Maestro prepaid card, issue MasterCard Prepaid Travel cards, offer cash at checkout when paying with a Debit MasterCard or Maestro Card. A country subdivision is a segment within a country (ex  state or province).  Please note country subdivisions are only available for the US and Canada.

endpoints.name: Returns merchant location information for merchants offering the following services: accept contactless-enabled cards and devices, allow customers to add money to an eligible MasterCard or Maestro prepaid card, issue MasterCard Prepaid Travel cards, participate in the MasterCard Easy Savings program, and offer cash at checkout when paying with a Debit MasterCard or Maestro Card.
endpoints.description: Returns merchant location information for merchants offering the following services: accept contactless-enabled cards and devices, allow customers to add money to an eligible MasterCard or Maestro prepaid card, issue MasterCard Prepaid Travel cards, participate in the MasterCard Easy Savings program, and offer cash at checkout when paying with a Debit MasterCard or Maestro Card.
